content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: Normal volatility (Vol: 25.9%) with broad participation (Breadth: 7/8 sectors positive).

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Technology & Telecom ABOVE TREND: KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, TCELL (1W: +2.73% | 1M: +11.06%) ABOVE TREND. Construction & REIT ABOVE TREND: TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND, ENKAI (1W: +5.68% | 1M: +14.85%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Transportation CORRECTION: TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION, THYAO (1W: +1.78% | 1M: +13.16%) ABOVE TREND shows mixed internals. Energy & Chemicals has isolated weak names (TUPRS (1W: -0.59% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND) despite sector strength.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +10.66% | 1M: +0.65%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION, SOKM (1W: -6.39% | 1M: -1.03%) BELOW TREND, TUPRS (1W: -0.59% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND, OYAKC (1W: -0.23% | 1M: +10.28%) CORRECTION, AEFES (1W: +0.62% | 1M: +10.91%) ABOVE TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +8.85% | 1M: +11.78%) ABOVE TREND — clear breakout momentum in tech, chemicals and construction.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banking ABOVE TREND: AKBNK (1W: +6.57% | 1M: +13.91%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +4.27% | 1M: +12.16%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +2.72% | 1M: +11.11%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +1.66% | 1M: +10.89%) ABOVE TREND, VAKBN (1W: +1.32% | 1M: +9.12%) ABOVE TREND — defensive cyclicals rally on broad risk-on flows.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy Industry ABOVE TREND: EREGL (1W: +2.36% | 1M: +13.30%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (data ranked high) EREGL/KRDMD strength confirmed, ASELS (1W: +3.89% | 1M: +18.71%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +6.36% | 1M: +4.23%) ABOVE TREND — steady, broad participation across manufacturers.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Energy & Chemicals ABOVE TREND overall: SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +10.66% | 1M: +0.65%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +8.85% | 1M: +11.78%) ABOVE TREND; watch TUPRS (1W: -0.59% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND for sector divergence.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on stance: overweight Technology & Telecom, Construction and select Energy & Chemicals momentum names; maintain overweight large-cap banks for beta and liquidity. Trim Transportation and names failing to confirm monthly gains (SOKM, TUPRS) and lock profits in outsized winners.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND for continuation or mean-reversion, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND on flows, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND for follow-through, TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION as a watch-for-capitulation candidate.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Technology & Telecom, Construction & REIT, and Energy & Chemicals — they are driving breadth and price leadership.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Monitor XU100 reaction to recent breakout levels and weekly moving-average support (near recent swing lows); key catalysts: CBRT policy commentary, USD/TRY moves, global risk-on/off shifts and oil/commodity prices, and any earnings/sector-specific newsflow next week.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

RISK-ON market with normal volatility and broad sector participation; technology, construction and chemicals are leading while transportation shows pockets of weakness. Trade selectively into momentum winners (KONTR, SASA, TKFEN), keep banks for liquidity exposure, and trim laggards and large short-term run-ups to lock gains.
